text.message: Dang am i really a solo?
Don’t think i get a port anytime soon

So blue had to solo one of us two
And I’ll say you were the block
From you’re point of view sure
From the other two players and mine, it’s you
I was just making the point they had to solo there. There wasn’t a non solo option
Right and im stating my case that its you, with the wheat and the port incoming
Vs me with no wheat and no port
He has a down dev ornage
What’s with the robs in mad confsued
wait so long for a single 4, then 2 in a row
Focus on the right blocks red is leading clearly
hey, it was either the 6 or the 8, 6 would have robbed u
wanted to rob red or blue
Or the 9 if you thought blue was in the lead
I think both red and blue are going v well
and we need to work together
Sorry too busy getting slam robbed first 5 hits of the game
trade is there on ur turn if u want black
Lost at least 15 ore this game
lol can’t wait to see recourses lost this game
red u are gonna win this 100%
I have one message in the last like 25 messages
You are literally 3 messages up lol
